title: Obsolete Collaboration Copy Of Access Review Policy
description: A synthetic collaboration repository copy that represents a superseded access review policy version.

provenance.change_summary: Synthetic copy retained after policy version 1 was superseded.

permissions.handling_notes: Synthetic obsolete copy. It can show history but cannot control a decision after its effective period.

content_fingerprint.notes: Computed from the UTF-8 bytes of example_content in this repository file.

verification.method: Version metadata comparison against the active policy record.
verification.notes: The copy represents policy version 1, which was superseded by version 2 on 2026-01-01.

example_content:
Synthetic Access Review Policy v1.0
Effective: 2025-01-01 through 2025-12-31
Authority: Synthetic Policy Standards Board
Requirement: Access to regulated systems must be reviewed periodically.
